title: VocaFlow
subtitle: Voice AI agents businesses deploy themselves
oneliner: Multi-tenant platform for building and deploying AI voice agents across phone, chat, and WhatsApp.
description: A multi-tenant platform where users build and deploy AI voice agents across phone, chat, and WhatsApp. Agents answer with knowledge retrieval, collect structured data mid-conversation, and hand off to a human when it matters — at sub-second latency, around the clock.
stack: React, FastAPI, Supabase, OpenAI Realtime API, Twilio, Stripe, Redis, Docker, Azure

title: 8-Agent Dev Team
subtitle: A full software team, staffed by Claude Code
oneliner: Eight specialized Claude Code agents running complete sprint workflows, coordinated through Notion and GitHub.
description: Eight specialized Claude Code agents — PM, frontend, backend, AI, DevOps, QA, test, docs — coordinated through Notion and GitHub. I ran complete sprint workflows solo: backlog planning, implementation, PR review, merge. Four weeks in, the team had shipped 170+ issues and 726 automated tests across a ~40,000-line codebase.
stack: Claude Code, Notion MCP, GitHub CLI, Playwright MCP

title: AI Prospecting System
subtitle: Agents that research, qualify, and write
oneliner: Multi-agent system that researches prospects, qualifies opportunities, and drafts personalized outreach.
description: A multi-agent system that researches prospects, qualifies opportunities, analyzes competitors, and drafts personalized outreach — then delivers strategic reports straight into the CRM. It cut manual prospecting time by roughly 80% at Agile4ux.

title: Airline Customer Service Assistant
oneliner: GenAI capstone (Kaggle × Google): structured-dialogue assistant with RAG over a dedicated knowledge base.
stack: Python, LangChain, ChromaDB, RAG, Gradio, Gemini

title: Content Creation Automation
oneliner: Specialized agents per source research, generate, and publish Facebook content — with email validation and automated comment moderation.
stack: Python, n8n, MCP, Meta Developer, Tavily, ChromaDB

title: Recruitment Automation System
oneliner: Four interconnected pipelines: candidate intake, AI scoring, ATS sync, and lead generation — extracted job requirements once, reused everywhere.
stack: n8n, Make, REST APIs, Webhooks, Notion

title: Pedagog'IA
oneliner: Social platform for Tunisian teachers with AI generation of fiches, quizzes, and exercises — plus credits system and admin panel.
stack: Next.js, FastAPI, Supabase, pgvector, GitHub Models

title: 5G Throughput Prediction
oneliner: Full MLOps pipeline comparing 300+ models on Azure ML, explainable via SHAP + GPT-4o, monitored with Elasticsearch and Kibana.
stack: Azure ML, FastAPI, Docker, Elasticsearch, Kibana, SHAP, MLflow, GitHub Actions

title: Industrial Anomaly Detection
oneliner: CNN autoencoder trained only on defect-free screws flags defects by reconstruction error — real-time, −70% manual inspection time.

title: TT Assistant
oneliner: Multilingual voice + text chatbot for Tunisie Telecom (Arabic, French, English, Tunisian dialect) — 3rd place, AI for CSR Hackathon.
stack: GPT-4o, Whisper, LangChain, FastAPI, n8n, Telegram

title: Odoo Integrations
oneliner: Odoo CRM wired into a multi-agent prospecting system, plus a facial-recognition attendance module.
